channel.title: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations
channel.description: The Rest of the Record feed: The Rest of the Record — HPD Class C Violations

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2090 1 AVENUE, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE LATCH SET AT STAIR 'D'S FIRE DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL STAIRS, 2nd STORY, SECTION ''2100'', 1st FROM NORTH AT NORTHEAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2090 1 AVENUE, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005, 27-2007, 27-2041.1 HMC, §238, § 309; § 107 (2) ( C) MDL AND 28 RCNY §25-171: REPLACE OR REPAIR THE SELF-CLOSING DOORS THAT IS MISSING OR DEFECTIVE FRAME AT STAIR 'A'S FIRE DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL STAIRS, 2nd STORY, SECTION ''2100'', 1st FROM NORTH AT NORTHEAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1304 COLLEGE AVENUE, Apt 3D, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2031 ADM CODE PROVIDE HOT WATER AT ALL HOT WATER FIXTURES IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 3D, 3rd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM NORTH AT EAST

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1304 COLLEGE AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2033 ADM CODE PROVIDE READY ACCESS TO BUILDINGS HEATING SYSTEM DOOR LOCKED AT FRONT YARD

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 425 WEST 162 STREET, MANHATTAN
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 ADM CODE REPAIR THE ROOF SO THAT IT WILL NOT LEAK OVER CEILING AT SCUTTLE LADDER AT PUBLIC HALL, 3rd STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 416 EAST 187 STREET, Apt 1A, BRONX

item.description:

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 2607 JEROME AVENUE, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2005 HMC: PROPERLY REPAIR OR REPLACE THE BROKEN OR DEFECTIVE GLASS PANE AT BUILDING ENTRANCE DOOR AT PUBLIC HALL, 1st STORY

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 34-57 72 STREET, Apt 3F, QUEENS
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2043.1 HMC INSTALL THE MISSING OR REPAIR/REPLACE THE DEFECTIVE WINDOW GUARD(S) IN ACCORDANCE WITH THE SPECIFICATIONS OF THE NEW YORK CITY HEALTH CODE SECTION 24 RCNY CHAPTER 12. WG TO INSTALL = 1; WG TO REPLACE = 0; WG TO REPAIR = 0; IN THE ENTIRE APARTMENT LOCATED AT APT 3F, 3rd STORY, 1st APARTMENT FROM SOUTH AT WEST

item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.description:
Outcome: Open

item.title: HPD Class C violation — 1526 BEACH AVENUE, Apt 10, BRONX
item.description:
Outcome: Open
§ 27-2056.6 ADM CODE - CORRECT THE LEAD-BASED PAINT HAZARD-PAINT THAT IS PEELING OR ON A DETERIORATED SUBSURFACE AND EITHER TESTED INCONCLUSIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT AT 0.5MG/CM2 OR TESTED POSITIVE FOR LEAD CONTENT ON A METAL OR CERAMIC SUBSTRATE AS SET FORTH IN (28 RCNY §11-07(b)) USING WORK PRACTICES SET FORTH IN 28 RCNY §11-06(b)(2). 1st DOOR FRAME FROM WEST AT NORTH WALL IN THE BATHROOM LOCATED AT
